content.text: The theme uses the new UI colors API format, but zellij 0.41.2 only supports the old `fg`/`bg`/`black`/`red`/... format. Need to rewrite it.

input.content:
themes {
  rose-pine-moon {
    fg 224 222 244
    bg 42 40 62
    black 35 33 54
    red 235 111 146
    green 62 143 176
    yellow 246 193 119
    blue 196 167 231
    magenta 234 154 151
    cyan 156 207 216
    white 224 222 244
    orange 246 193 119
  }
}

content.text: Config validates cleanly. The theme used the new UI colors API (introduced in a later version), which 0.41.2 doesn't support — converted it to the old `fg`/`bg`/named-colors format using the Rose Pine Moon palette values already present in the file.
